quote: Datadog engineers want their agents to move fast, and we want our credentials and production systems kept safe while they do. nono is the only sandbox that gives us both fine-grained, per-command policies and sophisticated credential management that fits existing, complex real-world toolchains.
name: James Carnegie

quote: Security is embedded in everything we build at Okta. nono gives us the confidence to innovate with AI agents by isolating their execution in a highly secure, policy-controlled sandbox. It ensures our credentials remain locked down and protected, without sacrificing developer velocity
name: Leonardo Zanivan

quote: Neat project, thanks for sharing! I like the OS-specific security primitives, useful built-in profiles, and being able to customize what's allowed/blocked.
name: Clint Gibler

quote: OS-Level Isolation for AI Agents. Really awesome work and resource here
name: Chris Hughes

quote: I integrated nono into my project this weekend and it was a breeze to work with!
name: Terra Tauri

quote: Beautiful work! It is encouraging to see kernel security being taken seriously, especially during this current episode of OpenClaw and Moltbot.
name: Cuong Nguyen
